concept: Give me a survival game where I manage a lighthouse during increasingly severe storms on a mysterious island. The lighthouse must be maintained through resource management, with strategic decisions about when to venture outside for supplies during storm intervals. Strange debris washes ashore after each tempest, some useful for upgrades, others hinting at supernatural origins of the weather patterns. The island slowly reveals its secrets through dream sequences that occur when I sleep, suggesting that the lighthouse may be keeping something imprisoned rather than warning ships away.
